title: Project Engineer
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

· Assist Project Manager and his deputy on day-to-day management, site technical/ engineering matters and authority submissions.

· Prepare method statements, monthly progress claims measurement and reports.

· Co-ordinate with sub-contractors and consultants.

· Ensure that the works are carried out in accordance with the Project Quality & Safety Plan, contract requirements, including drawings and specifications

· Supervise and monitor projects are carried out in accordance to company’s operating procedures, quality standards & contractual specifications.

· Interpret engineering documents and drawings for field personnel

· Ensuring environmental, safety and health practices are carried out at all times.

· Perform other duties / tasks as assigned by immediate superior or Head of department.


Requirements

· Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering recognised by Professional Engineers Board or qualification acceptable by Commision of Building Control for registration as Resident Engineer

· Min. 3 year work experience in Local Civil Engineering projects

· Proficient in MS Office

· Strong and clear communication skills with proven ability to engage others

· Organised, meticulous with positive work attitude

· Able to work independently and a team player

postedCompany.description:
The Company was incorporated in Singapore on 18th July 2004. Chan & Chan Engineering Pte Ltd (CCE) is a Civil Engineering and Building Contractor in Singapore. We are able to provide an integrated range of Civil Engineering, Building, Marine works and Construction related services including design in the areas of:

  • Construction of Roads, Drains, Sewers, Canals etc
  • Traffic & Drainage Diversions
  • Upgrading and Maintenance of Roads & Road Facilities
  • Drainage Improvement & Improvement to Roadside Drains in EUP projects
  • Construction New Carparks and Improvement to Existing Carparks
  • Vehicular Bridges & Flyover
  • Earth Retaining Structures
  • General Earthworks
  • Marine Structure & Platform
  • Warehouse Construction
  • Structural Steel Fabrication
  • Fencing & Hoarding
  • Addition and Alteration to Factories and Private housing
  • Demolition of Warehouse, Factories and Buildings, Pedestrian Overhead Bridges etc
  • Construction of Temporary Site Offices
  • Supply of Machineries and Equipment

Since commencement of our business, our customers include CAG, LTA, PUB, JTC, BCA, Singapore Prison Services, Sembawang Shipyard, SMOE, PPL Shipyard, Jurong Shipyard, Jacobs Engineering, GSK Glaxo, GS E&C,  Samsung, Tiong Seng, Hock Lian Seng Infrastructure, HSBC Institutional Trust Services, Mediacorp

Currently we are graded A2 for BCA grading CW02 (Civil Engineering) and graded C1 for BCA grading CW01 (General Building) and 
also registered under BCA for the single grade CR03 (Demolition) and CR04 (Fencing & Ironworks)

To know more about our company, visit our website at http://www.cce.com.sg/
postedCompany.name: CHAN & CHAN ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
